MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-26-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER. THE COURT MODIFIES ITS RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION TO CONSIDER THE LATE-FILED PAPERS. TICKET FAIRY HAS LEAVE TO FILE A SUR-REPLY OF NO MORE THAN 10 PAGES BY JUNE 11, 2026, WHICH SHALL ADDRESS THE REVIVOR CERTIFICATE. IF TICKET FAIRY SUBMITS NEW EVIDENCE TO ACCOMPANY ITS SUR-REPLY, TWITCH HAS LEAVE TO FILE A SUR-SUR-REPLY OF NO MORE THAN 10 PAGES BY JUNE 18, 2026. THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER FOR HEARING TO JUNE 26, 2026. THE COURT WILL ISSUE A WRITTEN ORDER. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
TENTATIVE RULING:
Matter on calendar for Tuesday, June 30, 2026, Line 9, PLAINTIFF TWITCH INTERACTIVE, INC.'s APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER.

(Complete tentative ruling emailed to the parties).

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jun-26-2026 Continued To Jun-30-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TWITCH INTERACTIVE, INC's APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Continued on the court's own motion to June 30, 2026.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Continued To Jun-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER

The court's tentative ruling continued this motion to a court holiday. No one contested the tentative ruling. The court now modifies its ruling as follows: Plaintiff Twitch Interactive, Inc. seeks a right to attach order and writ of attachment. Defendant Ticket Fairy Inc. submitted a late opposition brief and is still pursuing a revivor certificate. Twitch submitted significant new evidence in reply. The court exercises its discretion to consider the late-filed papers. Ticket Fairy has leave to file a sur-reply of no more than 10 pages by June 11, 2026, which shall address the revivor certificate. If Ticket Fairy submits new evidence to accompany its sur-reply, Twitch has leave to file a sur-sur-reply of no more than 10 pages by June 18, 2026. The court continues the matter for hearing to June 26, 2026.

The court will issue a written order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Apr-23-2026 Continued To May-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
